column.text:
• Cleveland Guardians placed third baseman José Ramírez on the 10-day injured list due to a left hamate fracture.
• Kansas City Royals placed first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino on the 10-day injured list with a right hamate fracture.
• San Francisco Giants placed right-hander Keaton Winn on the 15-day injured list with a right elbow strain.
• Cleveland Guardians designated left fielder George Valera for assignment.
• San Diego Padres designated right-hander Ty Adcock for assignment.
• Philadelphia Phillies signed free agent second baseman Luke Ritter to a minor league contract.
• Texas Rangers recalled left fielder Alejandro Osuna from Triple-A Round Rock.
• San Francisco Giants sent right-hander Tyler Mahle on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Sacramento.
• Cleveland Guardians activated shortstop Gabriel Arias from the 60-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
